section_miscategorizations.text: His alkaline phosphatase was elevated to 156, and his lipid panel showed elevated total cholesterol of 247, HDL of 66, LDL of 166, and triglycerides at 74. His tsh was normal at 2.68, and his cbc was unremarkable. His most recent vitamin d level was at the high end of normal at 94.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are objective lab results and belong under exam/diagnostic findings rather than in the patient-reported history narrative.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is able to bike 30 miles and mostly keep up with his friend Tyler.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is functional history reported by the patient, not an observed exam or test finding, and fits better in the history of present illness.
